![Free Figma Admin Dashboard UI Kit - Tailwind Admin preview](https://s3-figma-hubfile-images-production.figma.com/hub/file/carousel/img/2b8d8537f0187f9aefc037ff2467b15c3a8c88a7/e0c4109ff70c96b2cf4d5d366917eae1139ebfb0)

About

Comments 0

Tailwindadmin is a free and customizable admin dashboard template built with Tailwind CSS and designed in Figma. It's made for developers and designers who want a fast and easy way to create powerful dashboards for web apps.

With reusable components, customizable layouts, and dark mode support, Tailwindadmin helps you create everything from SaaS dashboards to internal tools and analytics panels. Whether you're working on a CRM or a data-driven app, it’s the perfect foundation to start with.

Key Features:

1. Customizable layouts and components
2. Dark mode and multiple versions
3. Figma design system with React, Next.js, Vue.js, and Angular support
4. Easy to use and integrates smoothly with your web project
5. Free open-source Coded version on GitHub available

**[Tailwindadmin Live Demo 🚀 Free Download](https://tailwind-admin.com/)**

**Github Code** \- https://github.com/Tailwind-Admin/free-tailwind-admin-dashboard-template

⭐ Give a star to our GitHub repo to support us! 💜

Tailwindadmin gives you all the essential tools you need to quickly build and customize a fully functional admin dashboard for any web app. Perfect for both beginners and experienced developers, it saves your time by offering ready-made, flexible components. Plus, the free version has everything to get started on your next project!

About

Comments 0

1\. Header

Logo: Placed the logo in the top-center for brand recognition.

Navigation Menu: Included clear categories and pages name (e.g., Men’s, Women’s, Accessories).

Search Bar: Made it prominent for easy product searches.

Cart Icon: Ensured it's visible and easy to access.

Contact Info: Considered adding a email in the top.

2\. Hero Section

High-Quality Images/Videos: Used compelling visuals that represent your brand or highlight promotions.

Headline: Crafted a concise, impactful headline that communicates your main value proposition.

Call to Action (CTA): Added a primary CTA button (e.g., “Shop Now” or “Discover More”).

3\. Featured Products/Collections

Product Showcases: Highlighted bestsellers, new arrivals, or seasonal collections.

Product Categories: Displayed key categories to guide users to their desired products quickly.

4\. Promotional Banners

Sales and Discounts: Used banners to showcase current deals or upcoming sales.

5\. Seasonal Promotions: Included elements related to upcoming holidays or events.

6\. Blog Posts: Added Feature recent or popular blog posts if applicable.

7\. Footer

Social Proof: Displayed user-generated content or social media feeds.

Quick Links: Included links to important pages (e.g., About, Contact, FAQ, Shipping Info).

Newsletter Signup: Offered visitors a chance to subscribe to your newsletter for updates and promotions.

web.description: Get started with the definitive design system for building web applications with Tailwind CSS and Flowbite with Figma by leveraging hundreds of UI components, ...
web.markdown:
[NewWe have launched over 100+ blocks in E-commerce UI! See what's new](https://flowbite.com/blocks/e-commerce/)

# Build websites even faster with components on top of Tailwind CSS

Start developing with an open-source library of over 600+ UI components, sections, and pages built with the utility classes from Tailwind CSS and designed in Figma.

[Get started](https://flowbite.com/docs/getting-started/quickstart/) [Explore components](https://flowbite.com/#components)

## Design with Figma

Get started with the definitive design system for building web applications with Tailwind CSS and Flowbite with Figma by leveraging hundreds of UI components, sections, and pages based on variants, properties, auto-layout, dark mode, responsive support, and more.

[![Figma logo](https://flowbite.com/images/technologies/figma.svg)Preview in Figma](https://www.figma.com/design/BwJpLnMEFPsqLDaSgylB0V/flowbite-pro-figma-v2.10.0?node-id=18-0&node-type=canvas&t=dvpyXN5deopbkCyE-0) [![Flowbite logo](https://flowbite.com/images/logo.svg)Learn more](https://flowbite.com/figma/)

![Flowbite Figma Design System mockup](https://flowbite.com/images/figma-mockup-light.svg)

![Flowbite Figma Design System mockup (dark mode)](https://flowbite.com/images/figma-mockup-dark.svg)

![Flowbite Dark Mode](https://flowbite.com/images/dark-mode.svg)![Flowbite Dark Mode (dark)](https://flowbite.com/images/dark-mode-dark.svg)

## Dark mode integration

Flowbite has native built-in support for [dark mode](https://flowbite.com/docs/customize/dark-mode/) by using the variants from Tailwind CSS and the Flowbite Design System.

All of the UI components and templates from Flowbite will automatically switch to dark mode based on your browser settings or custom project configuration.

- Increased accessibility based on room brightness
- Better visibility for users with low vision
- Improved readability for users with light sensitivity
- High quality UI/UX design for modern applications

[Learn how to integrate dark mode](https://flowbite.com/docs/customize/dark-mode/)

## RTL (Right to left) Support

The UI components from Flowbite provide full RTL support for Arabic and Hebrew languages by using logical properties from Tailwind CSS.

- RTL support for a community of over 500 million people
- Based on logical properties from Tailwind CSS
- Works on a copy and paste basis
- Component preview available in the documentation

[Learn more about RTL](https://flowbite.com/docs/customize/rtl/)

![Flowbite RTL Support](https://flowbite.com/images/rtl.svg)

![Flowbite RTL Support in dark mode](https://flowbite.com/images/rtl-dark.svg)

![Flowbite Open-source SVG Icons](https://flowbite.com/images/flowbite-icons.svg)![Flowbite Open-source SVG Icons (dark mode)](https://flowbite.com/images/flowbite-icons-dark.svg)

## Flowbite SVG Icons

[Flowbite Icons](https://flowbite.com/icons/) is a free and open-source collection of premium SVG icons built for the Tailwind CSS, Figma and the Flowbite Ecosystem.

There are more than 400+ icons available in the collection and they come in two main styles: solid and outline.

You can configure the size, color, and stroke width via Tailwind CSS and our configurator tool and you can also import them in Figma via our community file.

- Huge collection of over 400+ SVG icons
- Free and open-source under the MIT License
- Solid and outline styles included
- Supports dark mode out of the box
- Figma file available for designers
- Compatible with Tailwind CSS and Flowbite

[Get started](https://flowbite.com/icons/) [View on GitHub](https://github.com/themesberg/flowbite-icons)

## Flowbite SVG Illustrations

[Flowbite Illustrations](https://flowbite.com/illustrations/) is a free and open-source collection of premium SVG illustrations built for the Tailwind CSS, Figma and the Flowbite Ecosystem.

Get started with over 54 free and open-source SVG illustrations based on 3D styles, fully compatible with Flowbite and Tailwind CSS.

- Collection of over 50 SVG illustrations
- Modern 3D style available in dark and light mode
- Use our color picker to customize the illustrations
- Available in Figma and SVG format

[Get started](https://flowbite.com/illustrations/) [View on GitHub](https://github.com/themesberg/flowbite-illustrations)

![Flowbite Open-source SVG Icons](https://flowbite.com/images/flowbite-illustrations-light.svg)![Flowbite Open-source SVG Icons (dark mode)](https://flowbite.com/images/flowbite-illustrations-dark.svg)

+

## Flowbite GPT

Start generating UI components, sections, pages, and code snippets with our custom trained GPT model based on open-source resources.

The data we used to train this ChatGPT is based on our extensive collection of UI component examples, JS API references and data attributes interface from the Flowbite Library.

[Open with ChatGPT](https://chat.openai.com/g/g-y7yC35HB9-flowbite-gpt)

![Flowbite ChatGPT](https://flowbite.com/images/chat-gpt.svg)

![Flowbite ChatGPT (dark)](https://flowbite.com/images/chat-gpt-dark.svg)

## Upgrade to Flowbite Pro

You get access to hundreds of UI advanced components and templates built with Tailwind CSS for Application, Marketing, Publisher, and E-commerce UI categories with Figma support included.

- Support for React and TypeScript components (on-going development)
- Templates and components available in Figma
- Pre-order for Vue, Svelte, and Angular pro components
- Access to over 430+ custom SVG icons in outline and solid styles

[Explore Flowbite Pro](https://flowbite.com/pro/) [Pricing & FAQ](https://flowbite.com/pro/#pricing)

About

Comments 2

TailAdmin is a robust and feature-rich admin dashboard kit, template, UI component library and design system hand crafted with Figma and built for Tailwind CSS available for HTML, React, Next.js and Vue.

This Dashboard kit perfect for developers and designers looking to create dynamic data-driven backends, admin panels, or dashboards for their web projects.

**Explore Live Demos**

1. [TailAdmin Official Site ✨](https://tailadmin.com/)
2. [Live Demo of TailAdmin 🚀](https://demo.tailadmin.com/)

TailAdmin offers an all-in-one solution for creating complex dashboard projects with ease. It includes all the essential elements, components, and functionality needed for a successful and faster dashboard design and development.

User-friendly and highly customizable, TailAdmin offers designers and developers to build powerful dashboards quickly using the unmatched synergy of Tailwind CSS and Figma using 400+ components and pages.

**Figma + Tailwind CSS Design System**

TailAdmin Design System is a design-forward, easily customizable solution that leverages all the advanced features of Figma. With the design system in place, you have the freedom to mold and shape your dashboard to suit your unique needs and aesthetic preferences. Our meticulously crafted system allows you to adapt everything from color schemes to component layouts, ensuring your dashboard is as distinctive as your brand.

**Dashboard Kit and Template for Tailwind: Figma, HTML, React, Next.js and Vue**

TailAdmin is much more than an admin dashboard template - it's a treasure trove of ready-to-use 400+ components, pages and templates that can effortlessly integrate with any web project. Whether you're working with HTML, React, Next.js, Vue.js, or any other popular framework, TailAdmin has got you covered.

**Extensive library of over 400 UI components and 5 Unique Dashboards**

With TailAdmin, you gain access to an extensive library of over 400 UI components. This vast collection gives you unparalleled flexibility and variety when designing or building a dashboard. Each component is carefully designed and coded, ready to be integrated into your project.
